template_data.lead_html: Most clients hit 'Renew.' Here's what we actually open.

rows.what_html: NAICS code audit — outdated codes make you invisible in searches
CAGE code & address check — one mismatch freezes active payments
Reps & certs review — most skipped, highest compliance risk

template_data.closer: RENEWAL ISN'T A CHECKBOX. IT'S A HEALTH CHECK.
template_data.image_headline: SAM RENEWAL IS NOT A CHECKBOX
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic process layout. Dark navy background. Bold headline top: 'SAM RENEWAL IS NOT A CHECKBOX'. Left side: illustrated professional woman in blazer reviewing a laptop showing SAM.gov portal screen. Right side: three-step vertical list with short 2-word labels and icons — 'NAICS AUDIT' with magnifier, 'CAGE VERIFY' with checkmark, 'CERTS CHECK' with clipboard. Bottom callout box in lighter navy: 'OPEN THE WHOLE FILE'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
